description: Ingest Health Monitoring (per device) - volume, per-device anomalies vs a 7-day hour-of-day baseline, latency/lag, and parser health. Default window 4h; widen with the time picker.

graphs.title: Total Ingest
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | group GiB = sum(gib) | limit 1

graphs.title: Total Events
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | group n = count() | limit 1

graphs.title: Active Sources
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | group n = estimate_distinct(dataSource.name) | limit 1

graphs.title: Active Devices
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let device = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | group ev = count() by device | filter ev >= 5 | group n = count() | limit 1

graphs.title: Devices over Lag SLA
graphs.query: sca:ingestTime=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let ingest_ts = number(sca:ingestTime) | let evt_ts = number(timestamp) / 1000000000 | let lag_min = (ingest_ts - evt_ts) / 60 | filter lag_min > 0 | let device = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | group p95_lag = p95(lag_min) by device | filter p95_lag > 15 | group n = count() | limit 1

graphs.title: Total Ingest Volume (GiB) over time
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | group GiB = sum(gib) by timestamp = timebucket('10 minutes') | sort timestamp

graphs.title: Event rate over time
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | group events = count() by timestamp = timebucket('10 minutes') | sort timestamp

graphs.title: Top sources by volume
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | group GiB = sum(gib), events = count() by source = dataSource.name | sort -GiB | limit 25

graphs.title: Ingest volume heat by source
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | group total = sum(gib) by source = dataSource.name | let mx = overall_max(total), mn = overall_min(total) | let normalized = ((total - mn) / (mx - mn)) * 100 | columns Source = source, Normalized = normalized

graphs.title: Active Devices
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let device = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | group ev = count() by device | filter ev >= 5 | group n = count() | limit 1

graphs.title: Devices spiking (z>=3)
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let device = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | let hod = simpledateformat(timestamp, 'HH', 'GMT') | let mykey = format('%s||%s||%s', dataSource.name, device, hod) | lookup exp_gib, exp_ev from ingestHealthBaseline by srckey = mykey | filter exp_gib > 0 | group cur_gib = sum(gib), cur_events = count(), exp_gib = any(exp_gib) by source = dataSource.name, device, hod | let dk = format('%s||%s', source, device) | lookup sig_gib from ingestHealthSourceStats by devkey = dk | let z_gib = (sig_gib > 0 ? (cur_gib - exp_gib) / sig_gib : 0) | filter z_gib >= 3 | group n = count() | limit 1

graphs.title: Devices dropping (z<=-3)
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let device = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | let hod = simpledateformat(timestamp, 'HH', 'GMT') | let mykey = format('%s||%s||%s', dataSource.name, device, hod) | lookup exp_gib, exp_ev from ingestHealthBaseline by srckey = mykey | filter exp_gib > 0 | group cur_gib = sum(gib), cur_events = count(), exp_gib = any(exp_gib) by source = dataSource.name, device, hod | let dk = format('%s||%s', source, device) | lookup sig_gib from ingestHealthSourceStats by devkey = dk | let z_gib = (sig_gib > 0 ? (cur_gib - exp_gib) / sig_gib : 0) | filter z_gib <= -3 | group n = count() | limit 1

graphs.title: Devices over Lag SLA
graphs.query: sca:ingestTime=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let ingest_ts = number(sca:ingestTime) | let evt_ts = number(timestamp) / 1000000000 | let lag_min = (ingest_ts - evt_ts) / 60 | filter lag_min > 0 | let device = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | group p95_lag = p95(lag_min) by device | filter p95_lag > 15 | group n = count() | limit 1

graphs.title: Top devices by volume
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let device = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | group GiB = sum(gib), events = count() by source = dataSource.name, device | sort -GiB | limit 40

graphs.title: Device volume heat
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let device = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | group total = sum(gib) by source = dataSource.name, device | sort -total | limit 40 | let mx = overall_max(total), mn = overall_min(total) | let normalized = ((total - mn) / (mx - mn)) * 100 | columns Source = source, Device = device, Normalized = normalized

graphs.title: Per-device live volume vs baseline (z-score)
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let device = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | let hod = simpledateformat(timestamp, 'HH', 'GMT') | let mykey = format('%s||%s||%s', dataSource.name, device, hod) | lookup exp_gib, exp_ev from ingestHealthBaseline by srckey = mykey | filter exp_gib > 0 | group cur_gib = sum(gib), cur_events = count(), exp_gib = any(exp_gib) by source = dataSource.name, device, hod | let dk = format('%s||%s', source, device) | lookup sig_gib from ingestHealthSourceStats by devkey = dk | let z_gib = (sig_gib > 0 ? (cur_gib - exp_gib) / sig_gib : 0) | columns source, device, hod, cur_gib, exp_gib, sig_gib, z_gib | sort -z_gib | limit 60

graphs.title: Volume by source (GiB, events, avg bytes/event)
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | group totalGiB = sum(gib), events = count(), AvgBytesPerEvent = sum(number(sca:bytesToCharge)) / count() by source = dataSource.name | sort -totalGiB | limit 50

graphs.title: Share of total GiB by source
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | group GiB = sum(gib) by source = dataSource.name | sort -GiB | limit 10

graphs.title: GiB by source
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | group GiB = sum(gib) by source = dataSource.name | sort -GiB | limit 20

graphs.title: Top devices by volume
graphs.query: sca:bytesToCharge=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let device = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | group GiB = sum(gib), events = count() by source = dataSource.name, device | sort -GiB | limit 30

graphs.title: Specific log types by volume (non-SentinelOne)
graphs.query: dataSource.name!='SentinelOne' sca:bytesToCharge=* event.type=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let gib = number(sca:bytesToCharge) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 | group GiB = sum(gib), events = count() by event.type | sort -GiB | limit 30

graphs.title: Max p95 lag (min)
graphs.query: sca:ingestTime=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let ingest_ts = number(sca:ingestTime) | let evt_ts = number(timestamp) / 1000000000 | let lag_min = (ingest_ts - evt_ts) / 60 | filter lag_min > 0 | let device = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | group p95_lag = p95(lag_min) by device | group m = max(p95_lag) | limit 1

graphs.title: Overall median lag (min)
graphs.query: sca:ingestTime=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let ingest_ts = number(sca:ingestTime) | let evt_ts = number(timestamp) / 1000000000 | let lag_min = (ingest_ts - evt_ts) / 60 | filter lag_min > 0 | group m = median(lag_min) | limit 1

graphs.title: Devices over SLA
graphs.query: sca:ingestTime=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let ingest_ts = number(sca:ingestTime) | let evt_ts = number(timestamp) / 1000000000 | let lag_min = (ingest_ts - evt_ts) / 60 | filter lag_min > 0 | let device = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | group p95_lag = p95(lag_min) by device | filter p95_lag > 15 | group n = count() | limit 1

graphs.title: Events sampled
graphs.query: sca:ingestTime=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let ingest_ts = number(sca:ingestTime) | let evt_ts = number(timestamp) / 1000000000 | let lag_min = (ingest_ts - evt_ts) / 60 | filter lag_min > 0 | group n = count() | limit 1

graphs.title: Ingest lag over time (p95 & median, min)
graphs.query: sca:ingestTime=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let ingest_ts = number(sca:ingestTime) | let evt_ts = number(timestamp) / 1000000000 | let lag_min = (ingest_ts - evt_ts) / 60 | filter lag_min > 0 | group p95_lag = p95(lag_min), median_lag = median(lag_min) by timestamp = timebucket('10 minutes') | sort timestamp

graphs.title: Lag percentiles by device
graphs.query: sca:ingestTime=* dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let ingest_ts = number(sca:ingestTime) | let evt_ts = number(timestamp) / 1000000000 | let lag_min = (ingest_ts - evt_ts) / 60 | filter lag_min > 0 | let device = (device.name ? device.name : (endpoint.name ? endpoint.name : (agent.uuid ? agent.uuid : (src_endpoint.hostname ? src_endpoint.hostname : (hostname ? hostname : dataSource.name))))) | group p95_lag = p95(lag_min), p99_lag = p99(lag_min), median_lag = median(lag_min), events = count() by source = dataSource.name, device | filter events >= 20 | sort -p95_lag | limit 50

graphs.title: Drifting parsers
graphs.query: parser=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let is_unparsed = ((dataSource.name && dataSource.category) ? 0 : 1) | group total = count(), unparsed = sum(is_unparsed) by parser | let normalised = total - unparsed | filter normalised > 0 | filter unparsed > 0 | let drift_ratio = unparsed / total | filter drift_ratio >= 0.05 | group n = count() | limit 1

graphs.title: Sources missing category
graphs.query: dataSource.name=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let nocat = ((dataSource.category) ? 0 : 1) | group total = count(), missing = sum(nocat) by source = dataSource.name | filter missing > 0 | group n = count() | limit 1

graphs.title: Worst drift ratio
graphs.query: parser=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let is_unparsed = ((dataSource.name && dataSource.category) ? 0 : 1) | group total = count(), unparsed = sum(is_unparsed) by parser | let normalised = total - unparsed | filter normalised > 0 | filter unparsed > 0 | let drift_ratio = unparsed / total | group m = max(drift_ratio) | limit 1

graphs.title: Parser drift (regressions)
graphs.query: parser=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let is_unparsed = ((dataSource.name && dataSource.category) ? 0 : 1) | group total = count(), unparsed = sum(is_unparsed) by parser | let normalised = total - unparsed | filter normalised > 0 | filter unparsed > 0 | let drift_ratio = unparsed / total | filter drift_ratio >= 0.05 | columns parser, total, unparsed, normalised, drift_ratio | sort -unparsed | limit 50

graphs.title: Top parsers by drift ratio
graphs.query: parser=* | lookup ih_excl_n = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.name | lookup ih_excl_v = reason from ingestHealthExclusions.csv by value =:anycase dataSource.vendor | filter (ih_excl_n = null and ih_excl_v = null) | let is_unparsed = ((dataSource.name && dataSource.category) ? 0 : 1) | group total = count(), unparsed = sum(is_unparsed) by parser | let normalised = total - unparsed | filter normalised > 0 | filter unparsed > 0 | let drift_ratio = unparsed / total | filter drift_ratio >= 0.05 | columns parser, drift_ratio | sort -drift_ratio | limit 15
